description: Legal notes in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe. The main document on recto mentions a roofed market (saqīfa) and numerous other landmarks. There are additional notes probably for other documents on verso, one of which is dated 524 AH (1129/30 CE).
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
